steps.title: Find circle N area
steps.content:
Circle N has radius $8$, so its area is
$$
\pi(8)^2=64\pi
$$

steps.title: Add the two areas
steps.content:
Circle M already has area $81\pi$. The total area is
$$
64\pi+81\pi=145\pi
$$

steps.title: Match the total
steps.content: The total area $145\pi$ is Choice A. The answer is A.
